title: Codices sacramentorum nongentis annis vetustiores
editions: (Rome 1680), includes the Gelasian Sacramentary=Vat. Reg. 316, the Missale Gallicanum, the Missale Francorum and the Missale Gallicanum Vetus. A complete edition of Thomasius was edited by A. Vezzosi, Opera Omnia, 7 vols. (Rome 1717-1754) The fourth volume of this collection was reprinted: J.M. Thomasi, Opera Omnia, Tomus Quartus in quo Responsorialia et Antiphonaria Romanae Ecclesiae (Farnborough 1969)
